ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental session */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experimental session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experimental session */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "trial_count" INTEGER /* Total number of trials conducted in the experiment */,
  "participant_count" INTEGER /* Total number of participants involved in the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "contact_preference" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact for the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Researcher's area of specialization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental session the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial type */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant involved in the trial */,
  "onset_time" REAL /* Onset time of the trial */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the trial */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the participant */,
  "trust_value" INTEGER /* Trust value assigned by the participant */,
  "choice" TEXT /* Choice made by the participant */,
  "choice_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the participant's choice */,
  "cLow" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the choice range */,
  "cHigh" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the choice range */,
  "trial_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_trial_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_type_id") REFERENCES trial_types ("trial_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_types" (
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial type */,
  "trial_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial type */,
  "trial_category" TEXT /* Category of the trial (e.g., choice, outcome) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "choices" (
  "choice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each choice */,
  "choice_name" TEXT /* Name of the choice (e.g., high, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the choice */,
  "choice_category" TEXT /* Category of the choice (e.g., high, low, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("choice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial sequence */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental session */,
  "trial_order" INTEGER /* Order of the trial in the sequence */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "sequence_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_sequences_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_sequences_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., CSV, text, image) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., text, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the note is associated with */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was written */,
  "note_author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the note */,
  "note_category" TEXT /* Category of the note (e.g., participant feedback, research notes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_notes_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_notes_note_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("note_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
